assertion.value: Jun Zhang and X.H. were employees of Tencent AI Lab. K.-H.Y. is an inventor on US patent 16/179,101 (patent assigned to Harvard University) and was a consultant for Curatio.DL (not related to this work). K.L.L. was a consultant for Travera, BMS, Servier, Integragen, LEK and Blaze Bioscience, received equity from Travera, and has research funding from BMS and Lilly (not related to this work). C.R.J is an inventor on US patent applications 17/073,123 and 63/528,496 (patents assigned to Dartmouth Hitchcock Medical Center and ViewsML) and is a consultant and CSO for ViewsML, none of which is related to this work.
assertion.name: Ethics
